Who We Are

Built on Integrity, Driven by Quality

Expert Exteriors started with a simple goal: to provide Wichita homeowners with reliable siding solutions they can trust. We saw a need for contractors who prioritize quality over shortcuts, and who treat every home as if it were their own. That's the principle we were founded on, and it's what drives us today.

Our approach is straightforward: listen to our clients, understand their needs, and deliver exceptional workmanship. We use only premium materials and proven installation techniques to ensure your siding stands up to Kansas weather. We're not just installing siding; we're building lasting protection for your home.

We're proud to be a part of the Wichita community. From College Hill to Riverside, we've worked on homes throughout the area, improving their curb appeal and protecting them from the elements. We're committed to providing honest, reliable service and building relationships that last.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose Expert Exteriors

Expert Installation

Our team of experienced installers ensures precise and secure siding installation for optimal performance.

Premium Materials

We use only top-quality siding materials that offer superior durability and weather resistance.

Local Expertise

We understand the unique challenges Wichita homes face and tailor our solutions accordingly.

Reliable Service

From initial consultation to final inspection, we provide clear communication and dependable service.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Expert Exteriors did a fantastic job installing new vinyl siding on our home in Riverside. The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product looks amazing. Our home looks brand new!

Sarah K. Vinyl Siding Installation
“

We had some storm damage to our fiber cement siding, and Expert Exteriors was quick to respond and repair it. The repair was seamless, and you can't even tell there was any damage. Great service!

David M. Siding Repair
“

Expert Exteriors replaced our rotting soffit and fascia, and we're so happy with the results. The work was done quickly and professionally, and we feel much better about protecting our home from water damage.

Emily L. Soffit and Fascia Repair
“

We chose Expert Exteriors for our James Hardie siding installation, and it was a great decision. The team was knowledgeable and professional, and the siding looks beautiful and will protect our home for years to come. Highly recommend!

John B. Fiber Cement Siding Installation
“

We hired Expert Exteriors for a siding inspection before purchasing a home in College Hill. They were thorough and identified some potential issues that we were able to address before closing. A great investment!

Jessica P. Siding Inspection
“

Expert Exteriors installed vinyl siding on my house. They were on time, professional, and cleaned up after themselves. The siding looks great and I'm very happy with the work.

Michael S. Vinyl Siding Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does vinyl siding last in Wichita's climate?
With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-30 years in Wichita's climate. We use high-quality materials and installation techniques to ensure longevity.
Is vinyl siding energy efficient?
Vinyl siding provides some insulation value, but it can be enhanced with the addition of insulation underneath. This can help reduce energy costs and improve your home's comfort.
What maintenance is required for vinyl siding?
Vinyl siding requires minimal maintenance. Regular cleaning with a garden hose and mild detergent is typically sufficient to keep it looking its best.
